transcript: Speaker A: En boss kitta enna solnumnu nalla nyabagam irukku. Aana call attend panna udane mind blank aayiduchu. Kadaisiyilla naan I am tomorrow come not nnu sollitten. Ennakku English theriyadhunnu illa. Thappu panniduvena, mathavanga ennai judge pannuvangannu bayam. [I remember well what to say to my boss. But as soon as I attended the call, my mind went blank. In the end, I said 'I am tomorrow come not'. It's not that I don't know English. I'm afraid of making mistakes and others judging me.] Speaker B: Don't worry, let's practice that. Speaker A: I won't be able to come in tomorrow coming. Speaker B: Say, I won't be able to come in tomorrow. Speaker A: Sorry for the inconvenience sir, please grant me this holiday. Speaker B: Sorry for the inconvenience sir. Please grant me this holiday. With SpeakX, there's no one to laugh at you. It's just you and your AI coach. It corrects your grammar and pronunciation instantly. Speaker A: Yes indeed. SpeakX app download pannunga. Daily 10 minutes practice pannunga. First 20 questions free. [Yes indeed. Download the SpeakX app. Practice 10 minutes daily. First 20 questions free.]
on_screen_text: En boss kitta enna solnumnu nalla nyabagam irukku. [I remember well what to say to my boss.] Aana call attend panna udane mind blank aayiduchu. [But as soon as I attended the call, my mind went blank.] Kadaisiyilla naan I am tomorrow come not nnu sollitten. [In the end, I said I am tomorrow come not.] Ennakku English theriyadhunnu illa. [It's not that I don't know English.] Thappu panniduvena, mathavanga ennai judge pannuvangannu bayam. [I'm afraid of making mistakes and others judging me.] Don't worry, let's practice that. I won't be able to come in tomorrow. Sorry for the inconvenience sir. Please grant me this holiday. With SpeakX, there's no one to laugh at you. It's just you and your AI coach. It corrects your grammar and pronunciation instantly. Yes indeed. SpeakX app download pannunga. [Download SpeakX app.] Daily 10 minutes practice pannunga. [Practice 10 minutes daily.] First 20 questions free. SpeakX KEY TO CONFIDENCE
summary: A Tamil-speaking woman describes freezing up and making grammatical errors when speaking English to her boss. She demonstrates how the SpeakX app's AI coach helps her practice and corrects her mistakes without judgment. The ad ends with a call to download the app and try the first 20 questions for free.
